title: Té Amo — Tea and Art House
html: Stub. Yahir's tea-and-art-house concept, originally conceived for Los Angeles. Mexican-American "third place" with tea blends, horchata combos, conchas, soup specials, rotating local art. Co-operator: jacoby. Two foundational docs: 2023 12 29 te amo tea and art house (research dump) and 2023 12 30 current thoughts on te amo tea and art house (operational pop-up plan). Visual identity anchored on Talavera Salazar heart-shape ceramics ("corazones" line).
